title: Acrylic Display Case for Minifigures & Collectibles - 12-Block Stackable, High-Transparency Storage Box
features: A Must for Your Collection: Showcase your impressive minifigure collection with the XIN SHI display cases for collectibles! Our 12-block display case offers an excellent solution for displaying your favorite and dearest figurines and create a unique statement in your home.

Made to Last: These box shelves are designed with high-grade acrylic material, which is durable and resilient. The boxes are sturdy and easy to handle, built to resist for years to come so you can pass on your precious collection as a legacy to future generations that share the same passion.

Versatile and Fun: Our display case for figures features 95% transparency, perfect to expose your figurines and other collectibles in all their glory. The boxes are stackable, versatile, and support the addition of light strings, so you can create eye-catchy structures to emphasize your collection.

Superior Protection: Not only can help you show everyone your vast collection of action figures but this display case shelf also keeps your figurines safe and protected from dust, dirt, or other impurities that may affect their integrity.

Thoughtful Present: Surprise your friends or family with a wonderful present that will definitely make a lasting impression! Our 12-building block acrylic display box makes an excellent present for collectors and enthusiasts that need a proper solution for maintaining their collectibles intact.
description: Product Description Proudly Display Your Minifigure Collection with Our Building Block Case! At XIN SHI, we know how important is for collectors to take care and showcase their favorite figurines and characters, so everyone can admire their collection. That is why we rely on top-quality materials and creative designs that enable us to deliver amazing display cases, guaranteed to surpass your expectations with their durability, practicality, and aesthetics. t completely satisfied with your order? Don’t worry, we are always at your service to address any issues or concerns. Compatible with LEGO technology The minifigures display case can help protect your collectibles from dust and impurities. Many suits of mainstream building blocks on the market can be easily installed to protect them, for example, Series 19 71025 Series 21 71029 Series 2 71024 Series 20 71027 Heroes Series 71026 Series 2 71028 etc. XIN·SHI Minifigure Display Case This display box set is definitely a must-have for collectors and hobbyists, providing a fun and stylish way to showcase the favorite collectibles, characters, or minifigures! Made with high-quality acrylic, these boxes are transparent, durable and offer 360-degree view so everyone can admire your collection in detail. The cases have a stackable design that allows you to create unique display structures and make a captivating statement in your home, office, or bedroom. 12-block display boxes set; Durable and reliable; 95% transparency; 360-degree view angle; Easy to install; Stackable design; Sturdy and secure; Ideal for collectibles, figurines, minifigures; 360°-Transparent Minifigures Display Case is made of acrylic material, 95% high transparency, showing the collection clearly in all directions. Protect Your Minifigures Each package contains 12 building block display boxes. You can expand as needed! At the same time, It also protects your action figures from dust and scale. Suitable for Lego Minifigure Many suits of mainstream building blocks on the market can be easily installed to protect them. Stackable Design It can be a single room, a double room or a three story villa. As long as you like, you can remove the roof and stack it. It can become a skyscraper. Building Block Base Plate The block base plate can be well adapted to your figures, and there are special weapon holes to place the weapons of the figures Free Assembly You can use your creativity and create more scenes, you can get more happiness from them. You can assemble and place them freely according to your products. XIN·SHI Guard your minifigures XIN·SHI Display Case, Black XIN·SHI Display Case, Grey XIN·SHI Minifigures Display Case, 12 PCs Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 497 4.4 out of 5 stars 361 4.2 out of 5 stars 190 Price £12.80 £ 12 . 80 — no data £11.99 £ 11 . 99 Merial Acrylic Acrylic Acrylic Item Dimensions 25.5 x 15.5 x 13.7 cm 25.5 x 15.5 x 13.7 cm 4.9 x 4.9 x 6.9 cm Weight 0.55kg | 1.2 lbs 0.55kg | 1.2 lbs (Single) 0.03kg | 0.06 lbs Suitable for LEGO ✓ ✓ ✓ Capacity about 35 minifigures about 35 minifigures 1 minifigure/case
